content.en:
Xuanlin Valley is the last industry of Luo Xia Pavilion, and Luo Wushuang doesn't know it.

However, she can't help it.

"Grandfather, it's too dangerous to guard Xuanlin Valley, relying on the formation of Xuanlin Valley, although it can resist the Eternal Dao powerhouse, it can't resist for too long. The Tempest Chamber of Commerce has not yet made a move on Xuanlin Valley, but is only worried that other forces will intervene and thus let Xuanlin Valley fall into the hands of other forces, but they will do it sooner or later. Therefore, the other Eternal Dao powerhouses were not willing to defend at all. Now that the Eternal Daoist powerhouse guarding Xuanlin Valley has reached the time, he will definitely leave, and I can't help it. Luo Wushuang said helplessly.

"It's a pity that my injuries are too serious, otherwise I can try to impact the Eternal Dao Realm at that time!"

Penal Haido.

"Grandfather, it's all my fault, if I hadn't asked you to find your father's body, you wouldn't have been severely injured!" Luo Wushuang regretted.

"I can't blame you, I can only blame my lack of strength. But the news of my injury, the Tempest Chamber of Commerce will know sooner or later, and once they know, I'm afraid they will destroy Luoxia Pavilion at all costs!" Xing Hai said.

Now, there are the rules of the ancient realm, and the Eternal Dao Realm must not act on the weak at will, unless the weak take the initiative to provoke.

Therefore, in the case that the Eternal Dao Realm of the Tempest Chamber of Commerce was unable to make a move, several powerhouses of the Tempest Chamber of Commerce in the late stage of Eternal Dao Transformation were still extremely afraid of Xinghai, but Xinghai had no combat power now.

But this news, the Tempest Chamber of Commerce is not clear.

"Grandfather, I'll find a way to heal your injuries!"

Luo Wushuang said.

"That's me who was injured by the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm, and it's the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm outside the Ancient Realm, there is no way to sanction him, the other party's attack is very weird, even if it is an Eternal Supreme Dao Realm, it will be difficult to heal my injuries!"

Xinghai said hopelessly.

......

Xuanlin Valley.

Ye Tian kept shuttling, and it took a while to get here.

As soon as he entered Xuanlin Valley, a powerhouse from the Eternal to the early stage of Daohua appeared, and after handing over to Ye Tian, the other party left directly, looking very urgent.

Ye Tian also understood, the other party was guarding here, and he was worried all the time, and it was estimated that he didn't even dare to cultivate, and his mental state was tense, and it was estimated that he was about to collapse.

Now, with the Eternal Daoist powerhouse taking over him, he naturally wants to run.

Xuanlin Valley has many top-notch formations, and there are also a number of Mythical Dao Realms digging ore veins.

"Use Mythology to Dao Realm Mining!"

Ye Tian was also very surprised.

Any Mythical Dao Realm is a veteran in the Void Realm, but he didn't expect to mine here.

Is the Fog Stone so difficult to excavate?

Ye Tian walked into the Xuanwu Stone vein and quickly understood.

The output of Xuanwu Stone is very small, and the excavation process will cause the energy of Xuanwu Stone to leak out, a trace of Xuanwu power, even the legend to the Dao realm can not withstand it, it will be directly bombarded, and only the mythical Dao realm can withstand it.

Other than that.

The Xuanwu Stone vein has formed a special domain field, which greatly suppresses the strength of the Mythical Dao Realm and even the Eternal Dao, and the ore veins here are extremely tough, even if it is the Mythical Dao Realm, it has to be excavated little by little, which is very time-consuming.

Although the mining of the Eternal Dao is much faster, there is no way to compare the efficiency of mining with a group of Mythical Dao Realms.

Besides, the Eternal Daoist powerhouse doesn't want to waste time mining.

"Xuanwu Stone, it's a good thing, but I can't take it!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This kind of Xuanwu Stone, every time it is dug up, it must be recorded, and the formation here also has a recording function, which will be transmitted back to the Luoxia Pavilion headquarters.

If he was greedy for these Xuanwu Stones, he would undoubtedly offend Luo Xia Pavilion.

Although no one in Luo Xia Pavilion could be his opponent now, he would not do so, and he also made an oath.

Of course.

There are also benefits to guarding Xuanlin Valley, and you will get one percent of the Xuanwu Stone, which is also one of the treatments.

The years that followed.

Ye Tian honestly guarded Xuanlin Valley.

A period of time passed.

......

The land of Ogu.

Tempest Chamber of Commerce Headquarters.

At this time, a powerhouse named Eternal to the late stage of Daohua was discussing the matter of Luoxia Pavilion.

"Everyone, Luoxia Pavilion's Xuanlin Valley has been replaced by an Eternal Daoist, and it is an Eternal Daoist who has newly joined Luoxia Pavilion. "

"Hahaha, Luoxia Pavilion really has no strong people available, and the last industry, even the newly added Eternal Daohua dares to use it, but it also shows that Luoxia Pavilion really has no extra power. Moreover, that speculation may be true. "

"Xinghai is really hit hard?"

"It's very likely, Xinghai hasn't shown up for 300 million in the Dao Era, even if Luo Xia Pavilion is in a difficult situation now, it's Luo Wushuang who is dealing with things. "

"Would you like to test it?"

"You can test it, if Xinghai is really hit hard, and we attack Xuanlin Valley, he will definitely not dare to come over. Of course, we also have to guard against other forces getting involved. Say hello to other forces, and if anyone dares to participate, it will be to fight to the death with our Tempest Chamber of Commerce. "

"Whoever is going to attack Xuanlin Valley, the formation there is good, it is the Eternal Dao Realm arrangement, even if it is the late stage of the Eternal Dao Transformation, it will be a little troublesome!"

"I'll go, bring our Tempest Chamber of Commerce's Formation Breaking Divine Weapon-Wild Mist Hammer, this one also belongs to the Semi-Eternal Supreme Dao Divine Weapon, with my strength, it won't be long before I can break through the Xuanlin Valley Formation!"

"Okay, then you can go by Ulun!"

Subsequently.

The Tempest Chamber of Commerce, the Eternal Daohua Late Stage powerhouse, Ulun, went to Xuanlin Valley.

It didn't take long.

Ulun has already come to Xuanlin Valley.

"Xuanlin Valley, it's a good place, it's going to be our Tempest Chamber of Commerce soon!"

Ulun said excitedly.

Rumble!!!!!

The Hammer of Fog emerges, covered with the power of the Eternal Sequence to the Dao Rules.

Immediately, he slammed it hard and smashed it into the Xuanlin Valley's large array.

Bang!!!!

The Xuanlin Valley Great Array was smashed like this, and it began to tremble.

......

Roselle City.

Luo Wushuang and Xinghai received the information transmitted by the Xuanlin Valley formation, and a picture emerged.

"It's not good, the Tempest Chamber of Commerce has made a move on Xuanlin Valley!"

Luo Wushuang said in despair.

The last piece of the industry can't be saved.

Without this last inheritance, Luo Xia Pavilion would not even be able to give out the basic treatment of its members.

If the treatment is not in arrears, the oath contract will automatically become invalid, and those Eternal Dao and Mythical Dao Realm can choose to leave.

At that time, Luo Xia Pavilion will really exist in name only.

At this time.

Inside the Xuanlin Valley.

Ye Tian opened his eyes and looked at Wulun in the outside world.

"Eternal to the late stage of Taoism, looking for death!"

Ye Tian's body moved, and he came to the outside of Xuanlin Valley.
